data.title: MarketAxess (Nasdaq: MKTX) reports August 2025 trading volume stats, with 8% growth in block transactions.
data.description: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. revealed trading data for August 2025, showing notable results. The company, listed on Nasdaq as MKTX, disclosed trading volume figures and preliminary variable transaction fees per million (“FPM”). In August 2025, they experienced a significant 8% increase in block transactions within the client-initiated channel. MarketAxess emphasized their advancements in client-initiated, portfolio trading, and dealer-initiated sectors. For comprehensive details, refer to tables 1-1C and table 2 showcasing the August 2025 highlights.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna Group's H1 2025 revenues reach €928 million; profit at €48 million and adjusted EBIT at €69 million.
data.description: The Ermenegildo Zegna Group reported a Profit of €47.9 million in the first half of 2025, showing an increase from €31.3 million in the same period in 2024. The Adjusted EBIT for H1 2025 was €68.7 million, down from €80.9 million in H1 2024. Ermenegildo “Gildo” Zegna, the Group's Chairman and CEO, stated that the results for the first half of 2025 demonstrate the Group's strategic focus on investing in the DTC store network.

data.title: Sky Harbour Group Corp closes $200M tax-exempt bank facility with J.P. Morgan. Subsidiary SKYH Capital II borrows.
data.description: A company called Sky Harbour Group Corporation disclosed that they secured a $200 million tax-exempt warehouse drawdown committed bank facility. This funding is for their subsidiary, Sky Harbour Capital II, LLC, and was facilitated by JPMorgan. Sky Harbour Group Corporation, listed on NYSE under SKYH and SKYH WS, focuses on constructing a nationwide network of Home Base Operator (HBO) campuses for business aircrafts.
